errors.unknownDice: Sorry - Jiki doesn't have a {{sides}} sided dice handy!
errors.announceNumber: You can only announce a number

describers.strike: struck the goblin with attack ${arg1} and damage ${arg2}

checks.announcementCount: Expected 3 announcements but got {{got}}. Make sure you announce each roll.
checks.firstAnnouncement: Expected the first announcement to be {{attack}} (the attack roll) but got {{got}}.
checks.secondAnnouncement: Expected the second announcement to be {{damage}} (the base damage roll) but got {{got}}.
checks.thirdAnnouncement: Expected the third announcement to be {{bonus}} (the bonus roll) but got {{got}}.
checks.notStruck: You didn't strike the goblin. Make sure you call strike().
checks.wrongAttack: Expected the attack to be {{attack}} but got {{got}}. Pass the attack roll to strike().
checks.wrongDamage: Expected total damage to be {{totalDamage}} ({{damage}} + {{bonus}}) but got {{got}}. Add the base damage and bonus together.

rollAndStrike.name: Roll the dice and strike the goblin
rollAndStrike.description: Roll three dice (d20 for attack, d12 for base damage, d10 for bonus), announce each roll, then strike the goblin with your attack roll and total damage (base + bonus).

randomRolls.name: Roll and strike
randomRolls.description: Roll d20 for attack, d12 for base damage, d10 for bonus. Strike the goblin with your attack and total damage.

chooseDie.question: How do I choose what type of die to use?
chooseDie.answer: For a 20 sided dice, use 20 as the input to roll - e.g. `roll(20)`. For a 12 sided dice, call `roll(12)`.

roll.description: Rolls a die with the given number of sides and **returns** the result.

strike.description: Strikes the goblin with the given attack roll and total damage.
